theoremName: augmented KLM-to-de Branges positive-kernel bridge theorem

shiftedXiKernelPositivityStatus.label: shifted-Xi de Branges kernel positivity
shiftedXiKernelPositivityStatus.reason: Imported shifted-Xi kernel theorem: K_{E_omega} is positive on finite upper-half-plane evaluation sets for 0<omega<1/2.

klmToDeBrangesBridgeStatus.label: KLM-to-de Branges positive-kernel bridge
klmToDeBrangesBridgeStatus.reason: The augmented KLM construction has been transported to the shifted-Xi de Branges kernel.  Therefore the endpoint theorem may use positivity of K_{E_omega} for every finite evaluation set.

formalProof: Import shifted-Xi de Branges kernel positivity for 0<omega<1/2.
Use that positivity as the KLM-to-de Branges transform output.
Pass the positive kernel family to the endpoint theorem.
nextProofTarget: Apply the de Branges/Hermite-Biehler endpoint passage for E_omega(z)=Xi(z+i omega).
